title: Trims Expanded
description: Trims Expanded aims to expand the available materials used while making armour trims to allow you to go beyond what the vanilla game can offer in your armour sets!
body:
# Notice: I've been swamped with a lot of work and resposibilities as of late and can't currently commit any time to updating this datapack to later versions until further notice! Thank you for your support! *(Please make sure you install the required resource pack as it is needed for the data pack to function correctly!)* ## New Trim Materials!

Armadillo
Scute
Breeze Rod
Coal
Dragon's
Breath

Echo Shard
Enchanted
Golden Apple
Ender Pearl
Fire Charge

Glowstone
Dust
Leather
Nether Brick
Poisonous
Potato

Popped
Chorus Fruit
Prismarine
Shard
Rabbit Hide
Slime Ball

Hint for finding crafting recipes Look closely at the gallery's preview images, you may find the required items in them.
Once you have them, use those instead of a template in their crafting recipes!
### This data pack is compatible with: #### *(Make sure to place the Trims Expanded resource pack above other packs if you're using them!)* - [Trimmable Tools](https://modrinth.com/datapack/trimmable-tools) *(Apollo)*
* Patterns do not currently work with tools.
Trimmable Tools Config ```{ "patterns": [ "minecraft:bolt", "minecraft:coast", "minecraft:dune", "minecraft:eye", "minecraft:flow", "minecraft:host", "minecraft:raiser", "minecraft:rib", "minecraft:sentry", "minecraft:shaper", "minecraft:silence", "minecraft:snout", "minecraft:spire", "minecraft:tide", "minecraft:vex", "minecraft:ward", "minecraft:wayfinder", "minecraft:wild", "trimsexpanded:danger", "trimsexpanded:plated", "trimsexpanded:shell", "trimsexpanded:margin", "trimsexpanded:verdant", "trimsexpanded:heart", "trimsexpanded:drip", "trimsexpanded:suspicious", "trimsexpanded:pride" ], "materials": [ "minecraft:amethyst", "minecraft:copper", "minecraft:diamond", "minecraft:emerald", "minecraft:gold", "minecraft:iron", "minecraft:lapis", "minecraft:netherite", "minecraft:quartz", "minecraft:redstone", "trimsexpanded:coal", "trimsexpanded:echo", "trimsexpanded:ender", "trimsexpanded:glowstone", "trimsexpanded:leather", "trimsexpanded:netherbrick", "trimsexpanded:prismarine", "trimsexpanded:rabbit", "trimsexpanded:slime", "trimsexpanded:flame", "trimsexpanded:dragon", "trimsexpanded:rainbow", "trimsexpanded:armadillo", "trimsexpanded:breeze", "trimsexpanded:amberpotato", "trimsexpanded:chorus" ] } ```
- [Elytra Trims](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-trims) *(KikuGie)*
* Only on versions before 1.21.2.
- [More Armor Trims](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-armor-trims) *(masik16u)*
- [TaTe's Extra Trims](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tates-extra-trims) *(AverageTaTeMan)*
* The material switching and removing trim mechanics introduced with this data pack do not work with the new materials added by Trims Expanded. - [Frost Armour Trim](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/frost-armour-trim/) *(SingularityGames)*
- [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves) *(AlexModGuy, Noonyeyz)*
